tool_args.label: Charter Adoption/Amendment
tool_args.raw_text: This Charter for the Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad was adopted by the Board Chair and a majority of the members of Board of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, as amended on March 21, 2018.

payload.description: This Charter for the Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad was adopted by the Board Chair and a majority of the members of Board of the Metropolitan Transportation Authority, as amended on March 21, 2018.

tool_args.label: Committee Purpose
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad (the \"Committee\") shall assist the Board Chair and the Board in fulfilling their responsibility to monitor and oversee the operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company (\"Metro-North\").

payload.claim_text: The Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad shall assist the Board Chair and the Board in fulfilling their responsibility to monitor and oversee the operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Authority
tool_args.raw_text: In discharging its role, the Committee is empowered to investigate any matter brought to its attention. To facilitate any such investigation, the chairperson of the Committee shall have access to all books, records, facilities and staff of the MTA and/or Metro-North.

payload.claim_text: In discharging its role, the Committee is empowered to investigate any matter brought to its attention. To facilitate any such investigation, the chairperson of the Committee shall have access to all books, records, facilities and staff of the MTA and/or Metro-North.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Membership
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee shall consist of 3 or more members of the Board, appointed by the Board Chair. If not otherwise a member of the Committee, each Vice-Chair of the Board shall be an ex officio member of the Committee.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall consist of 3 or more members of the Board, appointed by the Board Chair. If not otherwise a member of the Committee, each Vice-Chair of the Board shall be an ex officio member of the Committee.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Meeting Frequency
tool_args.raw_text: The Committee shall meet on a regularly-scheduled basis at least 11 times per year, and more frequently as circumstances dictate.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall meet on a regularly-scheduled basis at least 11 times per year, and more frequently as circumstances dictate.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Public Meetings
tool_args.raw_text: Meetings of the Committee shall be open to the public, and the Committee shall be governed by the rules regarding public meetings set forth in the applicable provisions of the Public Authorities Law and Article 7 of the Public Officers Law that relate to public notice, public speaking and the conduct of executive session.

payload.claim_text: Meetings of the Committee shall be open to the public, and the Committee shall be governed by the rules regarding public meetings set forth in the applicable provisions of the Public Authorities Law and Article 7 of the Public Officers Law that relate to public notice, public speaking and the conduct of executive session.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Responsibilities - Metro-North Oversight
tool_args.raw_text: To fulfill its purpose, the Committee shall: 1. monitor and update the Board Chair and the Board on the operating performance of Metro-North... 2. monitor and update... on the safety record... 3. monitor and update... on security programs... 4. monitor and update... on the finances... 5. review and make recommendations... regarding proposed procurement contracts... 6. review and make recommendations... on proposed capital projects... 7. review and make recommendations... regarding Metro-North service and policy changes... 8. facilitate the identification of approaches and solutions... 9. review periodically with the Counsel of the MTA, the Chief Compliance Officer, and the Counsel of Metro-North legal and regulatory matters and compliance policies.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall: (1) monitor and update the Board on the operating performance of Metro-North, including railroad service; (2) monitor safety record including customer and employee safety; (3) monitor security programs; (4) monitor finances including financial reports, ridership reports, and use of funds; (5) review and recommend on proposed procurement contracts; (6) review and recommend on proposed capital projects and monitor status; (7) review and recommend on service and policy changes; (8) facilitate security approaches and solutions; (9) review legal/regulatory matters and compliance policies with Counsel and Chief Compliance Officer.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Responsibilities - MTACC Capital Projects
tool_args.raw_text: With respect to capital projects undertaken by the MTA Capital Construction Company (MTACC) on behalf of Metro-North: 1. Review and make recommendations... with respect to the proposed procurements made by the MTACC... 2. Review and make recommendations... with respect to contract procurement solicitations... 3. Monitor the progress of the capital projects undertaken by the MTACC; 4. Monitor the budget and the schedule of capital projects undertaken by the MTACC; 5. Monitor the progress of contract commitments and completions with respect to capital projects; and 6. Track funding needs of capital projects as well as the availability of funds to meet such needs from all sources of funding.

payload.claim_text: With respect to capital projects undertaken by the MTA Capital Construction Company (MTACC) on behalf of Metro-North, the Committee shall: (1) review and recommend on procurements requiring Board approval; (2) review and recommend on contract procurement solicitations; (3) monitor progress of capital projects; (4) monitor budget and schedule; (5) monitor contract commitments and completions; (6) track funding needs and availability of funds.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad

tool_args.label: Committee Administrative Responsibilities
tool_args.raw_text: In addition, the Committee shall have the following responsibilities: 1. set the annual work plan for the committee; 2. conduct an annual self-evaluation of the performance of the Committee, including its effectiveness and compliance with this Charter; 3. review and assess the adequacy of this Charter annually; and 4. report regularly to the Board Chair and the Board on Committee findings and recommendations... and maintain minutes or other records of Committee meetings and activities.

payload.claim_text: The Committee shall: (1) set the annual work plan; (2) conduct an annual self-evaluation of the Committee's performance and compliance with this Charter; (3) review and assess the adequacy of this Charter annually; (4) report regularly to the Board Chair and the Board on findings and recommendations, and maintain minutes or other records of Committee meetings and activities.
payload.subject: Committee on the Operations of the Metro-North Commuter Railroad
